qlDesc: Kung kailangan mong umalis nang mabilis sa website, i-click ang "Mabilis na Umalis".

account.created: Salamat sa pag-sign up sa Lighthouse!
account.deleted: Nalulungkot na makita kang umalis. Maaari kang mag-sign up muli anumang oras.
account.alreadyExists: Uh oh! Ginagamit na ang username o email na iyon. Kailangan mo bang mag-log in sa halip?
account.incorrect: Ang iyong email o password ay hindi tama. Kailangan mo bang i-reset ang iyong password?
account.sessionExpired: Maaaring nag-expire na ang iyong session. Mangyaring mag-log in muli.
account.skin: Matagumpay na nabago ang tema ng website!
account.notVerified: Hindi pa nabe-verify ang iyong account! Pakisuri ang iyong email at i-verify ang iyong account.

PK.success: Matagumpay ang pag-import mula sa Pluralkit!

failure.unavailable: Ang Pluralkit ay kasalukuyang hindi maabot.

SP.success: Matagumpay ang pag-import mula sa Simply Plural!

failure.unavailable: Ang Simply Plural ay kasalukuyang hindi maabot.

posts.moved: Matagumpay na nailipat ang entry sa journal.

homepage.desc: Lighthouse is a safe and supportive space for people with PTSD and DID to explore their thoughts and feelings, identify their different [[ALTERS]], and develop healthy and positive communication internally.
homepage.disclaimer: Lighthouse was not developed by a medical professional, and is not intended to be a substitute for professional advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of your mental health professional or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding your condition.
homepage.author: Designed and programmed by The Lighthouse System.
homepage.bullet1Desc: [[ALTERSCAP]] get a private journal for their own thoughts and feelings that can be safe-guarded with a password.
homepage.bullet2desc: Users get both a Communal Journal and an Internal Forum that can be used by all [[ALTERS]] to keep everyone up-to-date.
homepage.bullet3: Get to the Root of Feelings
homepage.bullet3desc: Each [[ALTER]] can set a mood with a short reason as to why they feel that way.
homepage.bullet4desc: [[ALTERSCAP]] can provide basic information on themselves, but can also address what makes them feel safe, what they would want from the [[SYSTEM]], and what they would like accommodations for. Users can also create nested [[SUBSYSTEMS]], or a second standalone [[SYSTEM]], for those with complex [[SYSTEMS]].
homepage.bullet5desc: If you already use the popular Discord bot Pluralkit or the app Simply Plural, you can import your [[SYSTEM]] into Lighthouse!
homepage.bullet6desc: If you have a trauma-based [[SYSTEM]] or would like to use trauma worksheets, Lighthouse has a growing number of interactive pages to help process emotions, make a safety plan, or prepare for an event that you know will be stressful or triggering.
homepage.bullet6disclaimer: *These worksheets are intended for educational and informational purposes only and should not be used as a substitute for professional mental health care.
